html:
The Straw Hat is a Hat that reduces Wetness gain by 20% and provides 60 points of protection against Overheating. It requires 12 Cut Grass to craft and does not need to be prototyped. The Straw Hat loses durability when worn, lasting a total of 5 days. It can be repaired with a Sewing Kit, restoring 100% of its durability. Additionally, it is used to craft the Bush Hat, Miner Hat, and Rain Hat.

With the Seasonal Starting Items default preset, the Straw Hat will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during Spring.

Usage

×2

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Cowboy Straw Hat skin was introduced during the official Year of the Pig King event in 2019.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Pig King Collection
Cowboy Straw Hat
Puts the "cool" in cool and dry.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Hand-me-down Collection
Straw Bonnet
Sometimes you want to feel like the heroine of a Jane Austen novel.
Elegant
Floppy Straw Hat
Be like a little British lady in your garden!
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Parlor's Collection
Rancher Straw Hat
The herd won't respect you without a proper hat.
See ingame

Tips

  • Wearing a Straw Hat while holding an Umbrella is enough to provide 100% water resistance, preventing players from getting wet in the Rain.
  • A Straw Hat that is running low on durability can be used to craft a Bush Hat, Miner Hat, or Rain Hat, or added to a Campfire or Fire Pit as fuel.

Trivia

  • Despite being made of Cut Grass, this hat is non-flammable.

"strawhat"
“Hats always ruin my hair.”
–Wilson
“A hat made of straw. To think, it could've been tinder.”
–Willow
“Is good hat!”
–Wolfgang
“When the sun beats mercilessly, life finds a way.”
–Wendy
“THIS WILL COVER MY PROCESSING UNIT”
–WX-78
“This will offer some protection from the sun.”
–Wickerbottom
“It will keep the sun off my head.”
–Woodie
“A hat fit for a peasant.”
–Maxwell
“Required a large amount of grass to construct. But fairly worth the effort.”
–Wagstaff
“A hat för cööling after a raucöus battle.”
–Wigfrid
“This might keep the sun out of our eyes.”
–Webber
“Keeps my face from getting freckly.”
–Walani
“Now I am on island time.”
–Warly
“Not fit fer a captain. But makes fer a cool head.”
–Woodlegs
“IT SHADOWS WILBA'S HEAD”
–Wilba
“Friend hat”
–Wormwood
“I like it. It says, "I'm desperate for headwear."”
–Wheeler
“Keeps the sun outta your eyes.”
–Winona
“It'll be uncomfortable to wear on my horns.”
–Wortox
“Itchy...”
–Wurt
“That hat would never pass uniform inspection.”
–Walter
“I could dress up like a farmer, how fun!”
–Wanda
The Straw Hat is a Hat that reduces Wetness gain by 20% and provides 60 points of protection against Overheating. It requires 12 Cut Grass to craft and does not need to be prototyped. The Straw Hat loses durability when worn, lasting a total of 5 days. It can be repaired with a Sewing Kit, restoring 100% of its durability. Additionally, it is used to craft the Bush Hat, Miner Hat, and Rain Hat.
With the Seasonal Starting Items default preset, the Straw Hat will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during Spring.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Rơm là Mũ giúp giảm 20% độ ẩm và cung cấp 60 điểm bảo vệ chống quá nhiệt. Nó cần 12 Cỏ Cắt để chế tạo và không cần phải tạo nguyên mẫu. Mũ Rơm mất độ bền khi đeo, tồn tại tổng cộng 5 ngày. Nó có thể được sửa chữa bằng Bộ Khâu, khôi phục 100% độ bền của nó. Ngoài ra, nó còn được sử dụng để chế tạo Mũ bụi rậm, Mũ thợ mỏ và Mũ mưa.

But makes fer a cool head. |wilba = IT SHADOWS WILBA'S HEAD |wormwood = Friend hat |wheeler = I like it. It says, "I'm desperate for headwear." |winona = Keeps the sun outta your eyes. |wortox = It'll be uncomfortable to wear on my horns. |wurt = Itchy... |walter = That hat would never pass uniform inspection. |wanda = I could dress up like a farmer, how fun! |choose = wortox}} The '''Straw Hat''' is a [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] that reduces [[Wetness]] gain by 20% and provides 60 points of protection against [[Overheating]]. It requires 12 [[Cut Grass]] to craft and does not need to be prototyped. The Straw Hat loses durability when worn, lasting a total of 5 days. It can be repaired with a [[Sewing Kit/DST|Sewing Kit]], restoring 100% of its durability. Additionally, it is used to craft the [[Bush Hat/DST|Bush Hat]], [[Miner Hat/DST|Miner Hat]], and [[Rain Hat/DST|Rain Hat]]. With the '''Seasonal Starting Items''' default preset, the Straw Hat will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during [[Spring]]. __NOTOC__ =={{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item1=Straw Hat |count1=1 |item2=Gold Nugget |count2=1 |item3=Fireflies |count3=1 |result=Miner Hat |tool = Alchemy Engine}} {{Recipe |item1 = Straw Hat |count1 = 1 |item2 = Rope |count2 = 1 |item3 = Berry Bush Item |result = Bush Hat |tool = Alchemy Engine}} {{Recipe |item2 = Moleworm |count2 = 2 |item1 = Straw Hat |count1 = 1 |item3 = Bone Shards |count3 = 1 |result = Rain Hat |tool = Alchemy Engine}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head_items|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Cowboy Straw Hat''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Pig King]] event in 2019.
